race.comment: COLOUR OUR WORLD (2) looks well placed here. She pulled up with cardiac arrhythmia last time at Sandown Hillside when $6.50 in a much stronger race. Ignore that and go on her third placing at Geelong prior in a BM62 which reads very well. She lands in a great spot here from the gate and takes beating. SHE'S IMPECCABLE (3) was a dominant BM56 winner at Terang last time out, coming right away to score by three lengths. Tricky draw but she'll be rattling home off that. CHANTRA (12) is going okay of late, coming through a stronger race in town last time. This suits better. SAKAKIBARA (6) is a lightly raced mare who won narrowly on debut, good in a handy race at Ballarat last time. She can improve again and measure right up.
